The Synthesia REST API enables programmatic creation of AI avatar videos from scripts and templates, with endpoints for videos, templates, dubbing projects, translations, assets, audit logs, and webhooks. Source: https://docs.synthesia.io/reference

Contact Support:
 Name: Synthesia
